match.userMessage:
Locked overhead camera holds perfectly still in a top-down flat-lay framing. Coral lipstick tube rests motionless beside the embossed mark in the sand. Tiny grains shift almost imperceptibly across the matte surface in the breeze.
Natural daylight creates soft, slow-moving directional shadows that drift across the beige sand.
Subtle wind carries fine sand particles gently across the frame.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves and soft wind on sand. subtle sand grains shifting.
